name: Morphous Sand Dollar
description: A minimal coastal shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system derived from a sand dollar shell: cream shell surfaces, sand-tan borders, sea-foam accents, five-petal geometry, pore-texture details, and calm tideflat hierarchy.
typography: Geist for clear English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body text, labels, and compact metric displays.
layout: Quiet 8px product grids, shell-petal dividers, soft tideflat spacing, low-contrast cards, pore-texture accents, and restrained coastal dashboards.

motifMetadata.subject: single intact sand dollar shell
motifMetadata.material: matte cream shell with sand-tan staining and sea-foam undertones
motifMetadata.shapeLanguage: rounded notched disk, five-petal relief, fine pore texture
motifMetadata.transparentWorkflow: Generated on flat chroma key, removed locally, validated as RGBA with transparent corners.
